title: An Act to Amend the Laws Regulating Transient Sales of Home Repair Services
last_house_action: 2/26/2026 - This being an emergency measure, a two-thirds vote of all the members elected to the House was necessary. PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/3/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED - Emergency - 2/3 Elected Required, in concurrence.

actions.description: Committee on Labor suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR in concurrence

Reports READ . On motion of Representative ROEDER of Bangor, the Majority Ought to Pass Report was ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Reports Read On motion by Senator TIPPING of Penobscot the Majority Ought to Pass Report ACCEPTED . Bill READ ONCE ASSIGNED FOR SECOND READING NEXT LEGISLATIVE DAY.
COMMITTEE ON BILLS IN THE SECOND READING REPORTS NO FURTHER VERBAL AMENDMENTS NECESSARY. REPORT ACCEPTED. READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED , in concurrence. Ordered sent down forthwith
This being an emergency measure, a two-thirds vote of all the members elected to the House was necessary. PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED - Emergency - 2/3 Elected Required, in concurrence.
